title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing LLM, embeddings and chat components backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-model, file upload, RAG, admin panel).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API; sync/async, streaming, utils for common tasks.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight Retrieval-Augmented-Generation demo using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: chatbox-ai
summary: Cross-platform desktop chat client that supports Ollama, OpenAI, Claude; markdown, code highlight, prompts library.

title: ollama-workflows
summary: GitHub Actions for downloading, caching and spinning up Ollama models in CI pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Flask/React web interface for chatting with Ollama models; one-click Docker run.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with native async/await and streaming support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for reproducible CI pipelines that spin up Ollama services and run generative tests.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed async client and CLI for Ollama with Tokio and streaming support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and Source Generator for strongly-typed Ollama communication; supports .NET 6+.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client for Ollama using std.http with async I/O and optional static linking.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated collection of Modelfiles for量化, fine-tuned and experimental LLMs ready for Ollama.

title: ollama-rfcs
summary: Public RFC repository where the Ollama team discusses upcoming features like tool use, multi-modal, clustering.
